heading: Publication in Federal Register as notice of hearing
label: 1508 Publication in Federal Register as notice of hearing
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 308 (, ; , , ; , , ).July 26, 1935, ch. 417, § 849 Stat. 502Pub. L. 86–70, § 3473 Stat. 149Pub. L. 86–624, § 3374 Stat. 421June 25, 1959July 12, 1960
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 308 (, ; , , ; , , ).July 26, 1935, ch. 417, § 849 Stat. 502Pub. L. 86–70, § 3473 Stat. 149Pub. L. 86–624, § 3374 Stat. 421June 25, 1959July 12, 1960

children.text: not less than the time specifically prescribed for the publication of the notice by the appropriate Act of Congress; or

not less than fifteen days when time for publication is not specifically prescribed by the Act, without prejudice, however, to the effectiveness of a notice of less than fifteen days where the shorter period is reasonable.
